basic_details.job_title: Allahabad High Court – Special Judicial Magistrate – 7 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Allahabad High Court Recruitment 2026 for 7 posts of Special Judicial Magistrate. Candidates with LLB Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 25-07-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through Allahabad High Court official website allahabadhighcourt.in.

age_limit.age_details: Term of office is four years or attaining the age of 70 years, whichever is earlier.

qualification.education_qualification: Degree of law or otherwise well experienced in relation to legal affairs. Must hold or have held any post under the Government.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 45,000/- per month and Rs. 5000/- per month for conveyance

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Allahabad High Court Special Judicial Magistrate Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
seo_tags: Allahabad High Court Special Judicial Magistrate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
